name: tag
description: Display tag for labels, categories, and status indicators with semantic color variants and optional remove button.

props.name: variant
props.description: Semantic color variant controlling background, text, and border colors

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset controlling padding and text variant

props.name: removable
props.description: Whether to display a remove (✕) button inside the tag

props.name: onRemove
props.description: Callback invoked when the remove button is pressed
